form.label: Network Conversations with NetScaler RTT and Retransmissions

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20062` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (netscaler_client_rtt=* OR netscaler_server_rtt=*) | fillnull value=0 netscaler_client_rtt netscaler_server_rtt | eval rtt=netscaler_client_rtt+netscaler_server_rtt | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | bin _time $span_token$ | stats avg(rtt) as avg_rtt by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host transport _time | `dedup_timechart_events` | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by nfo_hostname exp_ip dest_ip | eval src_ip_string=if(isnull(l_src_host),src_ip,src_ip." (".l_src_host.")") | eval dest_ip_string=if(isnull(l_dest_host),dest_ip,dest_ip." (".l_dest_host.")") | strcat src_ip_string " - " dest_ip_string host_pair | timechart $span_token$ limit=10 useother="f" avg(avg_rtt) by host_pair

`netflow_search_rule_20062` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (netscaler_client_retrans_count=* OR netscaler_server_retrans_count=*) | fillnull value=0 netscaler_client_retrans_count netscaler_server_retrans_count | eval retrans=netscaler_client_retrans_count+netscaler_server_retrans_count | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | bin _time $span_token$ | stats avg(retrans) as avg_retrans by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host transport _time | `dedup_timechart_events` | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by nfo_hostname exp_ip dest_ip | eval src_ip_string=if(isnull(l_src_host),src_ip,src_ip." (".l_src_host.")") | eval dest_ip_string=if(isnull(l_dest_host),dest_ip,dest_ip." (".l_dest_host.")") | strcat src_ip_string " - " dest_ip_string host_pair | timechart $span_token$ limit=10 useother="f" avg(avg_retrans) by host_pair

`netflow_search_rule_20062` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (netscaler_client_retrans_count=* OR netscaler_server_retrans_count=* OR netscaler_client_rtt=* OR netscaler_server_rtt=*) | fillnull value=0 netscaler_client_retrans_count netscaler_server_retrans_count netscaler_client_rtt netscaler_server_rtt | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") $advanced_filter$ (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport src_vm_name dest_vm_name src_host dest_host | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eventstats latest(src_host) as l_src_host by exp_ip src_ip | eventstats latest(dest_host) as l_dest_host by exp_ip dest_ip | eval exp_ip_network_conversation=nfo_hostname."#".exp_ip."#".src_ip."#".l_src_host."#".src_vm_name."#".src_port."#".dest_ip."#".l_dest_host."#".dest_vm_name."#".dest_port."#".flow_type."#".transport | stats avg(netscaler_client_rtt) as avg_netscaler_client_rtt max(netscaler_client_rtt) as max_netscaler_client_rtt avg(netscaler_server_rtt) as avg_netscaler_server_rtt max(netscaler_server_rtt) as max_netscaler_server_rtt max(netscaler_client_retrans_count) as max_netscaler_client_retrans_count max(netscaler_server_retrans_count) as max_netscaler_server_retrans_count sum(sum_flow_count) as FlowCount avg(avg_duration) as avgduration by nfo_hostname exp_ip_network_conversation | eval temp=split(exp_ip_network_conversation,"#") | eval nfo_hostname=mvindex(temp,0) | eval exp_ip=mvindex(temp,1) | eval src_ip=mvindex(temp,2) | eval src_host=mvindex(temp,3) | eval src_vm_name=mvindex(temp,4) | eval src_port=mvindex(temp,5) | eval dest_ip=mvindex(temp,6) | eval dest_host=mvindex(temp,7) | eval dest_vm_name=mvindex(temp,8) | eval dest_port=mvindex(temp,9) | eval flow_type=mvindex(temp,10) | eval transport=mvindex(temp,11) | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | eval src_host=if(src_vm_name=="",src_host,src_host." (".src_vm_name.")") | eval dest_host=if(dest_vm_name=="",dest_host,dest_host." (".dest_vm_name.")") | lookup `is_local_lookup` port_lookup port AS src_port OUTPUT service AS service | strcat src_port "/" transport " (" service ")" src_port | lookup `is_local_lookup` port_lookup port AS dest_port OUTPUT service AS service | strcat dest_port "/" transport " (" service ")" dest_port | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name flow_type transport src_ip src_port src_host dest_ip dest_port dest_host avg_netscaler_client_rtt max_netscaler_client_rtt avg_netscaler_server_rtt max_netscaler_server_rtt max_netscaler_client_retrans_count max_netscaler_server_retrans_count | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename src_port as "Source Port" | rename src_host as "Source Host (VM)" | rename dest_ip as "Dest IP" | rename dest_port as "Dest Port" | rename dest_host as "Dest Host (VM)" | rename flow_type as "Flow Type" | rename transport as "Protocol" | rename avg_netscaler_client_rtt as "Avg Client RTT" | rename avg_netscaler_server_rtt as "Avg Server RTT" | rename max_netscaler_client_rtt as "Max Client RTT" | rename max_netscaler_server_rtt as "Max Server RTT" | rename max_netscaler_client_retrans_count as "Client Retrans" | rename max_netscaler_server_retrans_count as "Server Retrans"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
